codeWritten:
# Void-space theme — matches the tokyonight-night palette in nvim
gui:
  theme:
    activeBorderColor:
      - "#7DCFFF"
      - bold
    inactiveBorderColor:
      - "#5A5F78"
    optionsTextColor:
      - "#7AA2F7"
    selectedLineBgColor:
      - "#141620"
    selectedRangeBgColor:
      - "#141620"
    cherryPickedCommitBgColor:
      - "#1F2335"
    cherryPickedCommitFgColor:
      - "#BB9AF7"
    markedBaseCommitBgColor:
      - "#1F2335"
    markedBaseCommitFgColor:
      - "#C7A1FF"
    unstagedChangesColor:
      - "#F38BA8"
    defaultFgColor:
      - "#D8DCE8"
    searchingActiveBorderColor:
      - "#7DCFFF"
  authorColors:
    "*": "#7AA2F7"
  branchColors:
    main: "#BB9AF7"
    master: "#BB9AF7"
